acathla.name: Acathla
acathla.description: An ancient demon world shrouded in myth and shadow. Few who approach return sane.
logs: 2025-07-06: Initial scans reveal massive underground caverns.
2025-07-07: Crew experienced hallucinations near the surface.

kralik.name: Kralik
kralik.description: A dense jungle planet, home to dangerous wildlife and rumored warp anomalies.
logs: 2025-07-02: First away team lost contact for 2 hours.

dhoffryn.name: D'Hoffryn
dhoffryn.description: A desert planet with deep magical energy, often attracting rogue mystics.
logs: 2025-06-29: Detected anomalous energy spikes from the equator.
2025-07-01: Starfleet security alerted to cultist presence.

larconis.name: Larconis
larconis.description: An icy moon orbiting a dead gas giant. Prized for rare frozen gases.
logs: 2025-06-27: Mining operations halted after unexpected quake.
2025-06-28: Geological scans continue under hazardous conditions.

machida.name: Machida
machida.description: A volcanic world rich in raw power, constantly reshaping its surface.
logs: 2025-06-26: New lava tubes mapped from orbit.

starbase.name: Starbase
starbase.description: Main Starfleet outpost and staging ground for exploration missions.
logs: 2025-06-23: Incoming supply ship delayed by ion storm.
2025-06-24: Crew restocking and preparing for deep space ventures.

taraka.name: Taraka
taraka.description: A rogue planet drifting in deep space, radiating strange signals.
logs: 2025-06-20: Long-range scans pick up cryptic encoded messages.
2025-06-21: Deep space probe lost signal near surface.

lagos.name: Lagos
lagos.description: A lush ocean world teeming with bioluminescent marine life.
logs: 2025-06-18: Oceanic samples confirm unique regenerative properties.
2025-06-19: Submarine research vessel dispatched for deep dive.

kakistos.name: Kakistos
kakistos.description: A fortress planet once home to an ancient warrior caste. Now abandoned.
logs: 2025-06-15: Exploration team discovered old battle arenas.
2025-06-16: Artifacts retrieved, under Starfleet security lockdown.
